packageRules.description: Patch and digest bumps are automerged. They land before the 03:00 release run, so they ship the same night.
GitHub Actions. Grouped, and chore(deps) rather than fix(deps): a bumped action does not change the shipped app, so it should not cut a release on its own.
media_kit and friends carry the playback stack. A minor bump there is a real change to how video plays, so it gets a human.
Majors are never automerged. They land on the dependency dashboard and wait for a human.
